calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Bilal Kassen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MONICA ROSE GRANT.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CARL DOUGLAS SWANSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s). The Court takes the Matter under sumbission for the amount of the award for damages. The Court will sign Judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Aug-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Bilal Kassem, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MONICA ROSE GRANT.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CARL DOUGLAS SWANSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Monica Rose Grant sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
Court ordered hearing continued to August 20, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514.
Counsel for plaintiff to submit further documentation in support of request of punitive damages and general damages, at least 10 days before next hearing.
Court adjourned.
